allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/prompt/test -F system=你是一位专业的AI发型顾问。回答要简洁专业。 -F message=你好，请介绍一下你自己)
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/prompt/test -F system=请分析脸型，简洁回答。 -F message=请分析这张照片的脸型 -F model=step-1v-8k -F 'image=@test_face.jpg;type=image/jpeg')
Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 8288 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 1; netstat -ano | Select-String ':8000' | Select-String 'LISTENING'")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const code = fs.readFileSync\('frontend/vue.global.js', 'utf8'\); eval\(code\); console.log\(typeof Vue !== 'undefined' ? 'Vue exists' : 'Vue is undefined'\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const code = fs.readFileSync\('frontend/vue.global.cdn.js', 'utf8'\); eval\(code\); console.log\(typeof Vue !== 'undefined' ? 'Vue exists' : 'Vue is undefined'\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const code = fs.readFileSync\('frontend/vue.global.cdn.js', 'utf8'\); eval\(code\); console.log\('createApp:', typeof Vue.createApp\); console.log\('ref:', typeof Vue.ref\); console.log\('all keys:', Object.keys\(Vue\).slice\(0, 10\)\);")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Id 21768 | Select-Object Name, Path, StartInfo | Format-List")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const code = fs.readFileSync\('frontend/prompttest.html', 'utf8'\); const scriptMatch = code.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/g\); if \(scriptMatch && scriptMatch.length > 1\) { const appScript = scriptMatch[1].replace\(/<\\/?script>/g, ''\); try { new Function\(appScript\); console.log\('✅ JavaScript syntax is valid'\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\('❌ JavaScript syntax error:', e.message\); } } else { console.log\('Script not found'\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const html = fs.readFileSync\('frontend/prompttest.html', 'utf8'\); const startIdx = html.indexOf\('<script>'\); const endIdx = html.lastIndexOf\('</script>'\); console.log\('Script found:', startIdx !== -1 && endIdx !== -1\); console.log\('Start:', startIdx, 'End:', endIdx\); if \(startIdx !== -1 && endIdx !== -1\) { const script = html.substring\(startIdx + 8, endIdx\); console.log\('Script length:', script.length\); console.log\('First 200 chars:', script.substring\(0, 200\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); try { new Function\(fs.readFileSync\('frontend/vue.global.prod.js', 'utf8'\)\); console.log\('Vue JS syntax OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\('Syntax error:', e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const html = fs.readFileSync\('frontend/public/prompttest.html', 'utf8'\); const vueScript = html.match\(/<script>\\n\([\\s\\S]*?\)\\n<\\/script>/\); if \(vueScript\) { try { new Function\(vueScript[1]\); console.log\('Inline JS syntax OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\('Inline JS error:', e.message\); } } else { console.log\('No inline script found'\); }")
Bash(awk '/^## 一、/{start=NR} /^## 二、/{end=NR; exit} start && /请提供|请上传/' hair-advisor/agent.py)
